channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Groom Surprises Wife with a Car at Their Wedding in Tanzania
item.description: During a lavish wedding held at Moshono social hall in Tanzania, a groom surprised his bride with a stunning grey car, leaving many guests emotional. After completing the wedding ceremony, the groom l...

item.title: Vijay lacks sufficient support, AIADMK MLAs ready to step in
item.description: According to recent political developments, actor-turned-politician Vijay is reportedly facing challenges in securing the required number of support for his political endeavours. While exact figures a...

item.title: Nandi Senator Sparks Debate by Mentioning Arsenal Win in Parliament
item.description: Nandi Senator Samson Cherargei caused quite a stir in Parliament after he openly celebrated Arsenal’s victory over Atlético Madrid during a live House session. Cherargei mentioned that Arsenal’s 1-0 w...

item.title: The Rise of Afrobeats as a $29.6 Billion Global Music Industry
item.description: Afrobeats don blow up well well for global music scene, turning from small Lagos street vibes to worldwide stage performances. From 2017 wey Spotify streams of Afrobeats nearly no dey show for global ...

item.title: Protesters target Russian pavilion at Venice Biennale over Ukraine war
item.description: At the 2026 Venice Biennale, political tensions flared as protesters blockaded the Russian pavilion, expressing outrage over the ongoing war in Ukraine. Activists from Russian group Pussy Riot, joined...

item.title: KWS pushes for more Laikipia conservancies to support rhino range expansion
item.description: The Kenya Wildlife Service (KWS) is calling on community and private conservancies in Laikipia County to join efforts to expand rhino habitats under the Kenya Rhino Range Expansion (KRRE) programme. S...

item.title: Gombe APC Consensus Candidate Calls for Unity Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: Dr Jamil Isiyaka Gwamna, the APC consensus candidate for Gombe State governorship, don call on all party members to unite ahead of the 2027 elections. Even though some people no dey happy with the way...

item.title: Addressing Mexico’s Regulatory Gap for AI in Public Services
item.description: Mexico is increasingly relying on artificial intelligence (AI) to make decisions that affect citizens’ lives, including allocating social benefits, evaluating credit applications, prioritizing medical...

item.title: Nova Scotia RCMP investigates report of man with machete in Musquodoboit Harbour
item.description: Nova Scotia RCMP issued an alert regarding a man reportedly carrying a machete in the Gaetz Brook and Musquodoboit Harbour areas. While the initial alert warning has been cancelled, police continue to...

item.title: The Impact of Online Misinformation on Journalists and Vulnerable Communities
item.description: This article explores how online platforms can amplify lies while silencing those who try to correct them. Using the example of the Philippine government’s Lifeline Rate Subsidy (part of the 4Ps progr...

item.title: UK supermarket fashion brands gain ground against high street retailers
item.description: Supermarket clothing lines in the UK are increasingly competing with established high street brands such as Zara and Mango, offering trend-led designs at significantly lower prices. Retailers includin...

item.title: Retailer Next to Adjust Prices in Response to Rising Business Costs
item.description: Retail chain Next has announced plans to implement moderate price increases across its product lines as a direct response to rising operational costs. The company has been facing higher expenses in ar...

item.title: Google Releases Android Update to Patch Critical Remote Code Execution Vulnerability in System Component
item.description: Google has issued a security update for the Android operating system to address a critical remote code execution vulnerability identified as CVE-2026-0073. The flaw resides in the System component, sp...

item.title: Ted Turner, Founder of CNN, Passes Away at 87
item.description: Ted Turner, the visionary media mogul and founder of the Cable News Network (CNN), has passed away at the age of 87, CNN confirmed on Wednesday. Turner, widely recognised for revolutionizing news broa...

item.title: Oricred Establishes Working Capital Hub in Mokopane to Support Local Entrepreneurs
item.description: Oricred has established a purpose-built working capital Hub in Mokopane, aiming to close the gap between funding and execution for entrepreneurs operating in South Africa’s platinum belt. Many local b...

item.title: University of Ibadan Students Protest Over Ongoing Strike and Collapse of Basic Services
item.description: Serious tension show for University of Ibadan on May 6, 2026, as students come out protest because of worsening living and learning conditions for campus. The protest start small from students wey dey...

item.title: Thursday’s Superquiz and Mini Crossword for Readers
item.description: The Sydney Morning Herald's Superquiz for Thursday, 7 May, offers readers a mix of brain-teasing fun and interactive engagement. The feature includes a Mini Crossword comprising ten clues spread acros...

item.title: U.S. corporate earnings surge, supporting stock market gains
item.description: U.S. corporate earnings have surged in the first quarter, propelling the stock market to new record highs. More than two-thirds of S&P 500 companies have reported results, indicating their highest qua...

item.title: Analyzing the Toboso Incident and Its Implications
item.description: The recent deadly encounters in Toboso, Negros Occidental on April 19, which resulted in 19 deaths including nine civilians, have sparked urgent calls for accountability. The incident has raised criti...

item.title: Myanmar President Will Not Attend ASEAN Summit 2026; Other Member States to Participate
item.description: The ASEAN Summit 2026 in Cebu will be attended by all heads of state from member countries except Myanmar. According to Dominic Xavier Imperial, Foreign Affairs Assistant Secretary and ASEAN spokesman...
